subcodes.first_line: The Book which God hath revealed in truth, wherein He commandeth the peoples unto justice and piety. Verily, He is the Lord of all humanity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الله بالحق و فیه یامر الناس بالعدل و التقی انه لمولی الوری فی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @suffering and imprisonment
